text.title: DR Drill Scenario Library Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Includes a skip-this-methodology branch.

branch.conclusion: Use sc-01-region-loss runbook; rotate next quarter
Use sc-02-db-corruption with PITR + integrity check
Use sc-06-vendor-breach runbook; rotate credentials + audit
Map scope to declaration criteria first; pick scenario from library
skip-this-methodology — preconditions in "Applies If" not satisfied

example.note: Drill scope? → matches branch "scope == regional_failover" → conclusion ref=r1-library-not-single-scenario
